  • Changelog

Package index

Package

bayesEfron-package bayesEfron
bayesEfron: Fully Bayesian Inference for the Empirical-Bayes Deconvolution Problem

Fit

Primary entry point for fitting the fully Bayesian Efron log-spline prior to a univariate random-effects deconvolution problem.

bayes_efron_fit()
Fit the Bayesian Efron random-effects model

Data preparation

Convert effect-size inputs (plain list or metafor::escalc() object) into the canonical bef_data class consumed by the fit pipeline.

as_bef_data()
Convert input data to a bayesEfron data object

Grid construction

Build the discrete support and natural-cubic-spline basis used by the Stan model. Four recipes covering the paper’s real-data, simulation, sensitivity, and an experimental KL-target setting.

make_efron_grid()
Construct an Efron log-spline grid

Compile and cache

Pre-warm the Stan model cache and maintain the on-disk and in-session cache layers.

bayes_efron_compile()
Pre-compile the bayesEfron Stan model
bayes_efron_clear_cache()
Clear bayesEfron compilation cache artifacts

Diagnostics

Sampler-health and convergence diagnostics produced by the fit pipeline.

diagnose()
Extract sampler diagnostics from a bayesEfron fit

Visualization

Caterpillar, prior-summary, sensitivity, and diagnostic views. Both ggplot2 and base-graphics backends.

plot(<bef_fit_re>)
Plot a bayesEfron random-effects fit

S3 methods

Family-agnostic methods on the parent bef_fit class (summary, print, coef, vcov, confint, as.data.frame, nobs, logLik, posterior::as_draws) plus format/print/summary on bef_data and bef_diagnostic.

format(<bef_fit>) format(<summary.bef_fit>) format(<bef_data>) format(<bef_diagnostic>) print(<bef_fit>) summary(<bef_fit>) print(<summary.bef_fit>) summary(<bef_fit_re>) coef(<bef_fit_re>) vcov(<bef_fit_re>) confint(<bef_fit_re>) as.data.frame(<bef_fit_re>) print(<bef_data>) summary(<bef_data>) print(<bef_diagnostic>) summary(<bef_diagnostic>) nobs(<bef_fit>) logLik(<bef_fit>) as_draws(<bef_fit>)
S3 methods for bayesEfron objects
